svg.title: Illustrative REALM few-shot adaptation performance
svg.desc: Two illustrative line charts compare REALM with transfer learning at K values of 1, 5, 10, and 20 labelled seizure examples. Hypothetical REALM AUC and sensitivity remain above transfer learning and approach hypothetical patient-specific references as K increases. Error bars are hypothetical one standard deviation values; no empirical performance is shown.

cc:Work.dc:description: Two illustrative line charts compare REALM with transfer learning at K values of 1, 5, 10, and 20 labelled seizure examples. Hypothetical REALM AUC and sensitivity remain above transfer learning and approach hypothetical patient-specific references as K increases. Error bars are hypothetical one standard deviation values; no empirical performance is shown.
